## Target Version

`vX.Y.Z`

## Release Checklist

- [ ] Version and tag intent confirmed
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] README install pin aligned
- [ ] Targeted tests passed
- [ ] `./scripts/release-verify.sh vX.Y.Z` completed

## Notes

Anything that should be called out in release notes or follow-up issues.
